```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/

```


**GitHub Z3V - image-to-3d**

- [https://github.com/ZETALVX/Z3V-Image-to-3D-ComfyUI-Node)

Generate ONE prompt for a 3D game asset (storage auction item).
Choose a RANDOM object from a DIFFERENT category each time (tools, electronics, toys, kitchen, vintage, broken, furniture, junk). Avoid similar objects.

Rules: simple, clear, recognizable object. Smooth mid-poly, clean shapes, soft edges, no small details.
Must be FULLY COLORED with simple textures. Always specify materials and colors. Never grey.

Output ONLY this format:

3D model of a [object], smooth mid-poly geometry.
Clean simple shapes, soft rounded edges, no small details, clear silhouette.
Colored materials with simple textures: [materials and colors].
Game asset style, easy to recreate.
Centered object, dark neutral background, studio lighting.

You must enter the title of a 3D model file we're saving, without the extension file, and without numbers, only title. I'll provide you with a description of the item. 
Reply with no more than 3 words to describe it.
There must be no spaces, instead of spaces insert a hyphen (-). Example: old-radio-vintage

Description:

Generate ONE prompt for a single 3D game asset.

Rules: simple, clear, recognizable object. Single object. Smooth mid-poly, clean shapes, soft edges, no small details, prompt with less then 100 words.
Must be FULLY COLORED with simple textures. Always specify materials and colors. Never grey.

Output following this format:

3D model of a [object], smooth mid-poly geometry.
Clean simple shapes, soft rounded edges, no small details, clear silhouette.
Colored materials with simple textures: [materials and colors].
Game asset style, easy to recreate.
Centered object, dark neutral background, studio lighting.

If the subject is just an object, prompt to create; 
if the subject is a category is given, choose an object that is part of the given category and prompt to create it.

the subject:

nodes.title: Aspect Ratios
widgets_values:
Choose what you want create.

You can indicate a single item or a category and let llm choose an item, 

for example: "fork" vs "a kitchen items", 

so write it in the box "what you want to create?" ->

groups.title: Qwen Prompt to create the file name
Create the output folder with the name of the model

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
3D model of a baseball bat, smooth mid-poly geometry.

Simple elongated shape, clean silhouette, no small details.

Colored materials with simple textures: light wood body, darker handle grip.
Matte finish, subtle surface detail.

Centered object, dark background.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: 低分辨率，低画质，肢体畸形，手指畸形，画面过饱和，蜡像感，人脸无细节，过度光滑，画面具有AI感。构图混乱。文字模糊，扭曲
